name: Chickpea Salad (Marks)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp hot pepper flakes (or to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chickpeas and drain them.
2. Place the drained chickpeas in a bowl.
3. Add the chopped celery and green onions to the bowl with the chickpeas.
4. Mix in the minced garlic, hot pepper flakes (or to taste), and Tahini Dressing.
5. Pour the dressing mixture over the chickpeas and combine everything thoroughly.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 LOW-FAT MEAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 129; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 2g; PRO: 7g; SOD: 320mg; FAT: 3g.
